What you're hiring
01

Movement Direction

For brand films and campaigns. He designs how bodies move on camera so the product reads as culture, not an ad.

brand / campaign
02

Artist Development

For musicians and performers. Signature moves, stage presence, and the on-camera instincts that turn a song into a moment people repost.

artist / label
03

Choreography

For music videos and live shows. A hook move built to travel, taught to your talent, filmed to loop.

video / live
04

Creative Direction

For the whole idea. From concept to camera, the eye that made one Charlotte kid impossible to scroll past.

concept / full

Anyone can
make a video.
Few can make
a body move
culture.

That is the difference between content and direction. One fills a feed. The other gets copied by people who will never know your name. He does the second kind.

love always wins
